name: NZS 3910:2023 — Conditions of Contract for Building and Civil Engineering Construction
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check tender packs and contract documents against NZS 3910:2023 — the current general conditions for building and civil engineering construction in New Zealand. Replaces NZS 3910:2013. Splits the previous Engineer role into Contract Administrator + Independent Certifier and updates payment, dispute and risk allocation provisions.
key_changes_vs_2013: Engineer role split into Contract Administrator and Independent Certifier
Payment provisions aligned with Construction Contracts Act 2002 (CCA) amendments
Updated insurance clauses (CAR / public liability minimums)
Health & Safety at Work Act 2015 (HSWA) alignment

related_standards.NZS 3915:2005: Conditions of Contract — without Engineer (civil only, niche)
related_standards.NZS 3916:2013: Conditions of Contract — Design and Construct
